name: example-backend-connect
title: Connect Backend
description: Connect a local backend code folder in any language, analyze its endpoints, models, and auth into BACKEND.md, interview the user about stack and pages via question forms, then generate a frontend wired to the real API.

description_i18n.en: Connect a local backend code folder in any language, analyze its endpoints, models, and auth into BACKEND.md, interview the user about stack and pages via question forms, then generate a frontend wired to the real API.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 连接任意语言的本地后端代码文件夹，分析其端点、数据模型和鉴权并写入 BACKEND.md，通过问题表单确认技术栈与页面，然后生成对接真实 API 的前端。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 連接任意語言的本機後端程式碼資料夾，分析其端點、資料模型與鑑權並寫入 BACKEND.md，透過問題表單確認技術棧與頁面，然後生成對接真實 API 的前端。

query.en: Connect my backend code folder and build a frontend for it. Analyze the backend in depth, write BACKEND.md, show me your understanding, ask me about stack (Vite/React/shadcn, Next.js, or plain HTML), pages, and look via question forms, then generate a frontend wired to the real endpoints.
query.zh-CN: 连接我的后端代码文件夹并为它构建前端。深入分析后端，写出 BACKEND.md，展示你的理解，通过问题表单询问技术栈（Vite/React/shadcn、Next.js 或纯 HTML）、页面和外观，然后生成对接真实端点的前端。
